title: Add reducer-level sparkline for newInfoRatio and convergence score history
why: Turns the existing ratio history into a compact trend line so operators can see decay, spikes, or flatlining without scanning the table.

title: Add canonical iteration-start lifecycle events for running-duration banners
why: The dashboard cannot honestly render iteration N running for Ts unless all executors write a start marker before dispatch and the reducer can detect an unmatched running iteration.

title: Show trend and in-progress summary in terminal gates and presentation output
why: Confirm-mode decisions happen in terminal, so the dashboard delta should be visible at the approval gate instead of buried in a generated markdown file.

title: Add reducer regression coverage for sparkline and in-progress states
why: The reducer overwrites the dashboard each pass; tests should pin the new trend and running-state sections so future template changes do not erase them.

text: Current deep-research dashboard already renders progress rows and last-three ratio text, but it has no sparkline and no active in-progress section; this makes S5-01 additive rather than a duplicate of recent S4 dashboard work.
newInfo: S5-01 target gap confirmed in current reducer output.
